reviews.comment:
Pésima atención de los empleados. Te contestan mal. Y es el segundo año que patamso ahí y siempre la misma mala onda. Las veces que hemos ido no les funciona la app de ypf o tienen algún problema con el sistema de cobro.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible customer service. They're rude. And this is the second year we've been there, and it's always the same bad attitude. Every time we've gone, the YPF app either doesn't work or they have some problem with the payment system.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROdjh2Z2FBEAE

reviews.comment:
Es un parador del ACA con pileta en la parte de atras de las habitaciones. Tiene un sector de mesas junto al río para quienes vayan con una heladerita. Muy familiar y lindo

(Translated by Google)
It's an ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) inn with a pool behind the rooms. There's a picnic area by the river for those bringing a cooler. Very family-friendly and nice.
